days.text: Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 north to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few rain patches. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 4 northeasterly winds.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 4 northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 4 to 5 east to northeasterly winds with gusts.
